mapper.sql: id, username, password, real_name, phone, email, avatar, gender, birthday, id_card, role, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_user WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_user
username = #{username}, password = #{password}, real_name = #{realName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, avatar = #{avatar}, gender = #{gender}, birthday = #{birthday}, id_card = #{idCard}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_user WHERE role = #{role} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_user WHERE is_deleted = 0
